name: Terry Sullivan, Official Rubio Campaign
subject: here’s what Marco will do tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44825609:6XQPDhLNF:m:1:1349778030:860F21749EC75B07716240A2E7B41D26:r)
---
| | | | Peter, Tonight is the fourth Republican presidential debate. Before I head to the debate venue to do our final walk through with Marco, I wanted to share our team's expectations for tonight: **Marco** Marco will do exactly what he did in the first, second, and third debates: he'll tell you his story, detail his conservative plans for the 21st Century, and invite you to become a part of our positive, conservative campaign. It's the formula for success that has worked in previous debates and brought growth to our campaign in terms of support, attention, and fundraising. **Our Team** We'll follow the same playbook to help seize the opportunities created by key Marco moments in tonight's debate. We'll make sure we set the record straight, share concrete examples of Marco's conservative ideas, and get new supporters connected with the campaign. **You** We're also counting on your help. Please watch the debate, invite friends to join you, and** [ follow along with our team online at MarcoRubio.com/debate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44825610:6XQPDhLNF:m:1:1349778030:860F21749EC75B07716240A2E7B41D26:r)** Sharing Marco's conservative message with your friends, family, and neighbors on social media is one of the most important ways you can help Marco around tonight's debate. **Other Candidates** Just like the last debate, we expect some of the other candidates, who are not enjoying the same success that our campaign is, to attack Marco with discredited misinformation. And just like last time, Marco will stay positive and not engage in the mudslinging. He'll be laser-focused on talking about his conservative ideas for America's future. **The Media** As Marco pointed out in the last debate, there's a strong liberal bias in the mainstream media -- it's basically the Democrats' Super PAC. Whether it's the debate moderators or pundits on TV, expect even more attacks on Marco from the Left. Don't fall for it. They don't want the Republican with the best conservative ideas to win. **[Arm yourself with the facts at MarcoRubio.com/debate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44825610:6XQPDhLNF:m:1:1349778030:860F21749EC75B07716240A2E7B41D26:r)** Marco and our whole team are excited for the debate -- we hope you are too. Terry SullivanCampaign ManagerMarco Rubio for President

name: Ben Carson, Jr.
subject: Help me say good luck to my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31546655:WMwYr6yN_:m:1:876315805:209A4567AC595B69C7DBFCC2929F1C7C:r)
---

Peter,

My dad, Dr. Ben Carson, isn't perfect, nor does he claim to be -- except maybe on the pool table. But he has lived his life in an exemplary fashion. He taught my brothers and me the importance of being honest and making choices that we wouldn't come to regret.

As a rule, sons tend to admire their fathers, but it's great to be able to say that my role model is my dad. This is what has made the past couple of weeks so tough to watch.

We are not a political family but we know campaigns are tough, particularly the scrutiny that comes with them. But it's hard to prepare for people, particularly those in the media, lying so blatantly about him.

However, I know things will work out because he has two of the most powerful weapons on his side -- the truth and pure intentions.

This morning, as my dad was getting ready for tonight's Fox Business/WSJ Debate, I wished him luck. I told him to tell the truth, to be himself, and to do his best to express the values and concerns of the millions of supporters around the country that are so invested in his campaign.

**[Before the debate starts at 9pm ET tonight, please join me in wishing him good luck as well. You can go here now to leave him a quick note.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31546655:WMwYr6yN_:m:1:876315805:209A4567AC595B69C7DBFCC2929F1C7C:r)
**
Thanks so much for everything you do. My dad, and my entire family, really appreciate it.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson, Jr.

name: Brooke Sammon, MarcoRubio.com
subject: how we prepare for a debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44828002:JpbBPhL7N:m:1:1349778030:1A9F638A94425AC1941AED8AB4673E26:r)
---
| | | | Peter, In just a few hours, Marco will be back on the debate stage for the latest Republican presidential debate. He's ready to go. He knows the issues and -- most importantly -- he knows what he stands for: conservative ideas for a New American Century. Our staff's preparations for the debate are a little different. Here's how we prepare for a debate:
* We work with supporters to host their own watch parties around the country, especially in our key early states.
* We prepare to set the record straight when Marco gets attacked.
* We ensure that we share Marco's best moments from the debate far and wide.

The list goes on, but you can tell there's a lot of preparation that goes into getting our team ready for a debate. Every single one of us has a job to do. As a fellow member of Team Marco, **[I'm inviting you to join us in preparing for tonight's debate by clicking here and chipping in $10.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44828003:JpbBPhL7N:m:1:1349778030:1A9F638A94425AC1941AED8AB4673E26:r)** Your support ensures that we have the team and resources necessary to make the most of Marco's best moments on the debate stage tonight. Just as it's important for all of us here at headquarters to do our part, [**we need all of Marco's supporters to pitch in with a donation in the next few hours to help us get ready.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44828003:JpbBPhL7N:m:1:1349778030:1A9F638A94425AC1941AED8AB4673E26:r) Thanks in advance for your support! Brooke SammonPress SecretaryMarco Rubio for President

body:
Dear :
I set off fireworks on the Republican debate
stage for daring to challenge massive new spending schemes from
one of my GOP opponents.

The fact is, America can't afford Senator
Rubio's trillion-dollar new welfare program or another trillion
dollars in misguided military spending. We just can't.

Plans like these threaten to send our country
to bankruptcy court, and actually endanger our ability to defend
and protect this country!

In other words, it's anything but
conservative.

But it's par for the course in Washington,
D.C.

And it's the reason BOTH parties have helped
sink our nation $18.5 TRILLION in debt.

, I know I'm going to be attacked for
daring to stand up to this madness.

But I'm not backing down.

Will you please stand with me by making your
most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away?

I'm counting on you. This fight is going to
get hot.

In liberty,

Rand Paul
